purpose: Machine-readable public benchmark target manifest for claim-valid comparison against current external SOTA.
notes: These are public benchmark targets, not internal Split A targets.
Comparisons are only claim-valid when the same protocol is matched.
On-target public benchmarking is frozen as a dual-threshold regime: CRISPR_HNN for the nine-dataset average target, CRISPR-FMC for per-dataset strong targets, transfer, and small-data targets.
Off-target leadership remains benchmark-frame-specific; CCLMoff is frozen as the primary multi-assay transfer and leave-one-dataset-out public target in this manifest.
Additional public datasets beyond the frozen canonical suite are encouraged as secondary evidence, but they do not replace the canonical suite for the primary external claim.

on_target.frozen_benchmark_regime: canonical 9-dataset Cas9 on-target benchmark, 5-fold CV, SCC primary, PCC secondary

must_beat_rules.minimum_external_claim: Match the frozen 9-dataset benchmark regime and beat CRISPR_HNN on average while also meeting or beating the CRISPR-FMC transfer and small-data thresholds.
must_beat_rules.stronger_claim: Beat CRISPR_HNN on the 9-dataset average and beat CRISPR-FMC on WT, at least one additional large dataset, HL60, and WT-to-HL60 transfer under matched protocol.

benchmark_frames.classification_transfer_lodo: Primary modern multi-assay compiled benchmark with matched Cas-OFFinder negative generation.
benchmark_frames.unified_classifier_secondary: DNABERT-Epi sgRNA-based unified classifier benchmark across CHANGE-seq, GUIDE-seq, and TTISS.
benchmark_frames.regression_uncertainty: crispAI CHANGE-seq probabilistic regression and uncertainty benchmark.

crispAI.calibration_requirement: qualitatively match or improve crispAI interval calibration on held-out CHANGE-seq

must_beat_rules.primary: Beat CCLMoff on a matched public assay-derived benchmark with matched negative construction.
must_beat_rules.stronger_claim: Beat CCLMoff on both cross-dataset transfer and at least one leave-one-dataset-out setting.
must_beat_rules.secondary_classifier_context: DNABERT-Epi is the secondary unified sgRNA-based classifier target when using that exact benchmark frame.
must_beat_rules.secondary_regression_context: crispAI is the regression and uncertainty target when using CHANGE-seq probabilistic regression.

integrated_design.claim_requirement: Define utility explicitly and benchmark with ranking metrics such as NDCG@k and Top-k hit rate against strong on-target and off-target component baselines.

calibration.note: Off-target uncertainty has a strong external reference class, but a claim-valid on-target uncertainty benchmark remains underdefined.

remaining_research_required: Benchmark-frame normalization across CCLMoff, DNABERT-Epi, and crispAI
Optional on-target uncertainty closure if a directly comparable external target emerges
